# CWE-283 — Unverified Ownership (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-283-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"
	"syscall"
)

// Safe: ensures the file is owned by the authenticated uid before deletion.
func DeleteUserFile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	info, err := os.Stat(path)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	stat := info.Sys().(*syscall.Stat_t)
	callerUID, _ := strconv.Atoi(r.Header.Get("X-UID"))
	if int(stat.Uid) != callerUID {
		http.Error(w, "not owner", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_ = os.Remove(path)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
